challenge.title: Korak 12
challenge.description:
Dodajte još dve stavke u red podataka za profiles — jedna za Tifani i druga za Doga:

  • Tiffany

    • id: 2
    • name: "Tiffany"
    • title: "Engineering manager"
    • bio: "I have worked in tech for 15 years and love to help people grow in this industry."

  • Doug

    • id: 3
    • name: "Doug"
    • title: "Back-End developer"
    • bio: "I have been a software developer for over 20 years and I love working with Go and Rust."

Vaša logika map() ne bi trebalo da se menja i sada prikaže sve tri kartice.

Dakle, vaš projekat za sekciju ponovno upotrebljivih kartica profila je završen!
